headline: PPG Launches SEM Automotive Refinish Products in Mexico
summary: PPG launches the SEM brand in Mexico, bringing automotive refinish solutions aimed at boosting repair quality, efficiency and reducing material waste.

raw.headline: PPG Launches SEM Automotive Refinish Products in Mexico

headline: PPG highlights momentum toward 2030 targets in 2025 Sustainability Report
summary: PITTSBURGH, May 21, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today released its 2025 Sustainability Report, showing further progress toward the company’s 2030 sustainability targets. Highlights include strong growth in sales from sustainably advantaged products driven by customer demand, as well as reductions in greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions across operations and the value chain, and investments in innovation, culture and communities.
